title: Attention Mechanisms
description: Tokenization, embeddings, self-attention, MHA, MQA, GQA, MLA, KV cache, and DeepSeek sparse attention.

title: Transformer Architecture
description: Transformer model innovations, multi-head attention, positional encoding, encoder-decoder design, and training dynamics.

title: JEPA — Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture
description: World models, representation collapse, self-supervised learning, and JEPA's approach to predicting abstract representations.
